title: Locate and Detain List
content:
{{Top|leg}}
The [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Empire's]] '''Locate and Detain List''' was one of the many "temporary" security measures implemented by [[Galactic Emperor/Legends|Emperor]] [[Palpatine/Legends|Palpatine]]. It kept amateur [[Commission for the Preservation of the New Order/Legends|COMPNOR]] operatives occupied with responding to citizens turning in their neighbors as suspected [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebels]], rather than tripping up one of the Emperor's meticulously planned schemes.

After the death of the Emperor, the Locate and Detain List became something of a "checklist" for [[Bounty hunter/Legends|bounty hunters]] and [[Assassin/Legends|assassins]]. A sufficiently skilled hunter could acquire a small fortune — or more — by capturing one of the Rebels on the list.

[[Gunner Groth]] carried a copy of the list, and made an attempt to capture one of the list's newest additions, [[Mara Jade Skywalker|Mara Jade]]. Unfortunately for Groth, he was not sufficiently skilled for the task, and did not survive the encounter.

==Appearances==
*''[[The Last Command]]'' {{Ab|The Last Command (unabridged audiobook)}} {{1stm|in book}}
